title: God’s Knights Open the Abyss
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Road, Nami, Luffy, Unknown person #9 as Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.
scene: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami push toward freeing Loki while Scopper Gaban tests them and God’s Knights begin a darker move against Elbaf’s children.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Gyaha ha ha! Don't get worked up,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You tried to kill me, and you think we'll just laugh it off?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, the key you're after is right behind you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: By the time you decide to leave...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would I?! I never wanna see you again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right, you moron! Thanks for the key!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there's no way we're gonna seek you out any time soon!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you really think I'd trust him that easily?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Haha haha, fair enough. Do as you please, Gyaban.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: All that excitement over a bird???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: It's a really, really weird one!!

summary: This part advances the Scopper Gaban and Elbaf’s New Threat through 29 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
